title: diplodiscus verrucosus
intro: Diplodiscus verrucosus, also known as the "hairy ball" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Diplodiscus verrucosus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
